summary: Captain Alley negotiates a peaceful settlement with Patrick of the Mano Guild to avoid further losses, successfully securing the Kunta Highlands and a rare item as compensation. Meanwhile, other guilds and characters scramble to recruit Captain Alley, who is focusing on leveling up his character to prepare for a potential professional debut. The chapter concludes with Reina tracking down Captain Alley to challenge him to a duel.
key_moments: Captain Alley negotiates a truce with Patrick of the Mano Guild, gaining control of the Kunta Highlands and a unique item.
Kang Hyunwoo reaches level 180 and celebrates his progress toward becoming a professional player.
Reina finds Captain Alley and challenges him to a duel.
